## Checklist

- [ ] Theme renders correctly in `npm run dev` / `npm run preview`
- [ ] Dark and light modes both work
- [ ] Responsive layout checked (mobile / tablet / desktop)
- [ ] No console errors in browser devtools
- [ ] Configuration changes are documented in `_config.yml` comments
